name: Black Forest Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Brush the sides and bottom of four 9-inch round layer pans with butter. Bake only two layers at a time.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except eggs. Beat on low speed to blend; beat for 2 minutes on medium speed, scraping the bowl frequently.
4. Add eggs and beat for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Pour 1/4 of batter into each pan. The layers will be thin.
6. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until done. Allow to cool slightly, then remove from pans and cool thoroughly on greased waxed paper to prevent sticking.
7. Alternate layers with chocolate filling and cream filling, ending with chocolate filling on top. Do not frost the sides of the torte.
